name: Cell Thawing (Recovery)

components.name: 4. 转移至 9 mL 预热培养基
7. 恢复 1–2 代后开始实验

notes.en: Quick-thaw protocol to recover frozen cells. Thaw rapidly in 37°C water bath, dilute DMSO immediately. Key is speed — DMSO is cytotoxic at 37°C. Allow 1–2 passages recovery before experiments.
notes.zh: 关键是速度——DMSO 在 37°C 对细胞有毒。解冻至剩小冰晶即可。不要离心（脆弱细胞）。确认活力 >90%。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells; ATCC Cell Thawing Protocol
